## Analyzers (1)

### KasperskyThreatIntelligencePortal `v1.0`
Analyze IP address, domain or hash via Kaspersky Threat Intelligence Portal

- **Author:** Peter Juhas
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `domain`, `hash`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/KasperskyTIP/KasperskyTIP.json)
